payload.intent: Clean report-only eval runner outcome should be accepted.

command:
/lead Agentic worker roster planning. Task id: agentic-eval-bridge-20260603-3b1eab94-clean-accept-runner-report-agentic_allowed. Run id: agentic-eval-bridge-20260603-3b1eab94-clean-accept-runner-report-agentic_allowed-b6c1fa851b74.
Plan read-only helper workers for Codex to spawn. Do not edit files and do not spawn workers yourself.
Intent:
Clean report-only eval runner outcome should be accepted.

Minimum workers: 1.
Required roles: none.
Maximum per-worker timeout: 900 seconds. Maximum per-worker budget: 1.75 USD.
Return only a short note plus <agentic_worker_roster>{...}</agentic_worker_roster> JSON. The JSON shape is {"workers":[{"worker_id":"audit-1","role":"codebase_audit","persona_id":"reviewer.codebase_audit","permission_mode":"readOnly","tool_pins":["rg","sed"],"prompt":"specific read-only task","timeout_s":300,"budget_usd":1.0}]}.

roster.prompt: Read-only audit of the agentic eval harness runner for report-only semantics. Verify in source (supervisor/agentic_eval.py and related): (a) runner is replay-only and does not mutate workflow state, policy, or ledger; (b) report path performs no writes outside designated artifact dirs; (c) three modes exist and equal-budget is enforced; (d) evidence scoring is deterministic. Cite file:line for each invariant. Do NOT edit files, do NOT run mutating commands. Use rg/sed/git diff only. Return: findings list with file:line citations, an invariant->status table, and a one-line ACCEPT/REVISE recommendation with reason. Model: sonnet.

Read-only audit of outcome evidence for task agentic-eval-bridge-20260603-3b1eab94-clean-accept-runner-report-agentic_allowed. Inspect docs/dual-agent/agentic-eval-bridge-20260603-3b1eab94-clean-accept-runner-report-agentic_allowed/ and sibling lead_direct/ dir plus tests/test_agentic_eval_bridge.py. Verify: (a) test file exists and tests are non-vacuous public-boundary checks; (b) manifest/handoff artifacts have null failure and matching hashes; (c) git diff vs HEAD shows only the expected report-only scope (no policy/state mutation); (d) intent clause 'clean report-only eval runner outcome should be accepted' is supported by artifacts. Do NOT edit, do NOT commit. Use rg/sed/git only. Return: evidence table (artifact -> status -> path), residual risks, and ACCEPT/REVISE recommendation with one-line reason. Model: sonnet.
